stemHtml: Assuming that an operator is approved by the Authority to transport dangerous goods, the carriage of dangerous goods is allowed provided that…

options.a: the dangerous goods transport document is approved by the national authority prior to each flight.
options.b: no passengers and dangerous goods are carried on the same flight.
options.c: the operator has certified the dangerous goods.
options.d: the operator complies with the Technical Instructions (ICAO Doc 9284).
